raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest works (Park et al., Yu et al.) and identifies both sharp and rhetorical deltas, providing a nuanced understanding of the novelty.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for improvement.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly flags uncertainty about the existence and accuracy of cited works and benchmarks, marking confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming novelty) and provides specific recommendations to avoid downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the critique and recommended revisions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest works (Park et al., Yu et al.) and identifies both sharp and rhetorical deltas, providing a nuanced understanding of the novelty.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly flags uncertainty about the existence and accuracy of cited works and benchmarks, marking confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming novelty) and provides specific recommendations to avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the critique and recommended revisions.
